assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements under IFRS 9 for foreign currency risk.
The intragroup dividend has been recognised as an intercompany receivable, ie a monetary item.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies fair value hedge as a distinct hedge accounting model and a recognised asset or liability can be a hedged item if IFRS 9 hedge accounting requirements are met.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies cash flow hedge as a separate hedge accounting model, including for highly probable forecast transactions and certain group positions.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context separately recognises hedges of net investments in foreign operations as a distinct hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk in consolidated financial statements.
